title: The Last of us
description: This mod adds all types of infected from 'The Last of us'. Plus a new armor that can be crafted using fungal growth from the face of a Clicker or Bloater.
body:
**_GeckoLib Required._**

 

This is a mod based on the popular video game 'The Last of us'.

 

This mod adds the different stages of infected from TLou, Such as 'Runners, Stalkers, Clickers, and Bloaters, Shamblers, and the Rat King!

This mod also adds armor that can be crafted by obtaining fungal growth from a clicker or bloaters face.

 

Soldiers and Sepaphites will be added in the next update.

 
This mod allows you to role play ‘The Last of us’ in Minecraft! You can fight later stages of infected like clickers, shamblers, and bloaters to obtain fungal growth in order to craft Fungal Armor and fight the Rat King!


This mod is recommended if you are planning on having an easy fight with infected. https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-gun-mod-unofficial

Please report any bugs.
